releases.summary: Establish the initial public app metadata release and historical baseline.
releases.commit_message: chore: establish initial metadata baseline (v1.0.0 First Move)
notes: Initial public app metadata release.
Historical pre-policy codename; dessert codenames start with the next release.

releases.summary: Add session history, mode metadata, mode switching and mobile name editing polish.
releases.commit_message: feat: add session history and mode metadata (v1.1.0 Apple Pie)
notes: Added current-session score history.
Added game mode and AI difficulty meta in the UI.
Added mode switching without a page reload.
Improved mobile long press for player name editing.

releases.summary: Add winning line animation, generated game sounds, mute and persisted player settings.
releases.commit_message: feat: add winning line sounds and persisted settings (v1.2.0 Brownie)
notes: Added winning line animation.
Added move, win and draw sound effects.
Added mute toggle.
Persisted player names, mode, starter, mute and AI difficulty in localStorage.

releases.summary: Add starter selection, round statistics, win-rate tracking and AI difficulty descriptions.
releases.commit_message: feat: add starter selection and round statistics (v1.3.0 Cheesecake)
notes: Added O, X and random round starter selection.
Added round, draw, win and win-rate statistics.
Added AI difficulty descriptions.

releases.summary: Polish mobile round actions, settings iconography and per-player move sounds.
releases.commit_message: fix: polish mobile actions and move sounds (v1.3.1 Cheesecake)
notes: Kept mobile new round action under the board.
Used a Material Symbols settings icon for mobile options.
Split move sounds per player and made draw sound distinct.

releases.summary: Refactor the app into focused runtime modules and typed metadata boundaries.
releases.commit_message: feat: refactor runtime modules and typed metadata (v2.0.0 Donut)
breaking_changes: Application code moved into controller, view, game, AI and service modules.
Environment variable config was replaced with typed app metadata.
Intro audio moved from public assets to generated Web Audio tones.
migration_notes: No localStorage schema changes were introduced.
Existing saved settings remain compatible with the modular runtime.
notes: Refactored the app into controller, view, game, AI and service modules.
Replaced environment variable config with typed src/app.config.ts metadata.
Moved intro audio to generated Web Audio tones instead of public assets.
Added the configured app name above the start menu with player-color glow.
Removed unused marker SVG assets after switching O and X rendering to CSS.

releases.summary: Improve mode-specific player defaults, reset language and CSS token organization.
releases.commit_message: feat: add mode defaults and CSS tokens (v2.1.0 Eclair)
notes: Added game-mode-specific default player names for player and AI modes.
Renamed the full reset action to main menu for clearer intent.
Split CSS into focused style modules and expanded native CSS nesting.
Moved style sizes, timings, shadows and spacing into global CSS tokens.
Changed default marker colors to indigo and pink.

releases.summary: Polish color swatches and winner status badge visuals while keeping layout stable.
releases.commit_message: fix: polish swatches and winner status badge (v2.1.1 Eclair)
notes: Polished color picker swatches to remove native browser borders.
Added a winner status badge with player-colored animated background.
Kept winner status layout stable while animating its background.
Adjusted winner status spacing and border radius for visual consistency.

releases.summary: Load the game runtime after mode selection and split production runtime chunks.
releases.commit_message: feat: lazy-load game runtime after mode selection (v2.2.0 Fudge)
notes: Added a lightweight start menu bootstrap so the game runtime loads only after choosing a mode.
Split GameController, GameView, AI, audio and game engine code into dynamic production chunks.
Preserved intro audio by creating the AudioContext during the initial start click.
Moved the mobile version label into the options modal and aligned mobile action controls.
Reserved stable space for the winner status badge to avoid mobile layout shifts.

releases.summary: Normalize module and service naming, static labels and production metadata.
releases.commit_message: feat: normalize modules services and static metadata (v2.3.0 Gelato)
notes: Renamed class modules to lowercase dot-separated filenames.
Replaced SettingsStorage with SettingsService naming.
Removed the AppConfigService wrapper and read typed app config directly where needed.
Made footer and menu version labels static in HTML to avoid version flash.
Added pointer-origin ripple feedback across buttons.
Added favicon and meta description for production pages.
Polished start menu title sizing and menu width.

releases.summary: Productize the game flow with versioned settings, a pre-game setup screen, match-based play, accessibility upgrades and a lightweight PWA shell.
releases.commit_message: feat: add versioned setup matches and PWA shell (v3.0.0 Honeycomb)
breaking_changes: Settings storage moved to a versioned schema.
The start flow changed from direct mode buttons to a setup-first flow.
Game state boundaries changed to support match-level play.
migration_notes: settingsSchemaVersion is added when settings are saved.
Existing names, colors, mode, difficulty, starter and mute settings are preserved when possible.
Missing match settings migrate to casual match mode.
notes: Introduced versioned settings storage with migration support.
Added a pre-game setup flow for mode, AI difficulty, starter and match mode.
Added match-based gameplay with casual, best-of-5 and race-to-5 modes.
Improved board accessibility with keyboard navigation and ARIA states.
Prepared a lightweight PWA shell with manifest and app icons.
Removed the redundant app.config.ts file and kept configuration close to its usage.

releases.summary: Unify the game action menu across desktop and mobile while polishing iconography, marker color controls and static release labels.
releases.commit_message: feat: unify game action menu and icon controls (v3.1.0 Ice Cream)
notes: Unified settings access into a shared modal on desktop and mobile.
Moved quick actions under the board so settings and new round share the same layout across viewports.
Removed the in-game change mode action in favor of returning to the main menu.
Added Material Symbols icons for menu actions and marker-shaped icons for player color controls.
Kept static version labels in HTML aligned with the release registry.
Refined match modes, AI difficulty disabling for PvP and menu copy.

releases.summary: Move the app shell and UI layer to Web Components with per-component templates and styles.
releases.commit_message: feat: move UI shell to Web Components (v4.0.0 Jelly Roll)
breaking_changes: The DOM shell moved from static page markup into an app-root Web Component.
UI module boundaries changed from a single DOM view to component-scoped templates and Shadow DOM styles.
Global CSS modules were removed in favor of component-owned styles.
migration_notes: No localStorage schema changes were introduced.
Existing saved player names, colors, mode, difficulty, starter, match mode and mute settings remain compatible.
notes: Added app-root as the top-level Web Component for the game shell.
Converted the board, scoreboard, quick actions, start menu, settings modal, history panel and footer into Web Components.
Moved component markup into .component.html files and component styles into .component.css files.
Added TypeScript declarations for Vite raw HTML imports.
Fixed PWA icon paths with public install icons for browser and Apple home screen installs.
Removed obsolete global CSS modules after moving styles into components.

releases.summary: Serve fonts locally to reduce render flashes and remove Google Fonts from the initial page.
releases.commit_message: fix: serve local fonts and remove Google Font requests (v4.0.1 Jelly Roll)
notes: Bundled Quicksand latin and latin-ext WOFF2 subsets under public font assets.
Bundled the subsetted Material Symbols Rounded icon font under public font assets.
Preloaded local text fonts from the document head with a valid font preload type.
Deferred the local icon font preload and @font-face registration until the game runtime starts.
Removed runtime dependencies on fonts.googleapis.com and fonts.gstatic.com.

releases.summary: Move game state into a reducer store and let Web Components own their render work while keeping the first load lighter.
releases.commit_message: feat: move game state to reducer store (v4.1.0 Key Lime Pie)
migration_notes: No localStorage schema changes were introduced.
Returning to the main menu no longer overwrites the saved game mode.
Existing saved player names, colors, mode, difficulty, starter, match mode and mute settings remain compatible.
notes: Added a reducer-backed GameStore for board state, match progress, player settings and history.
Slimmed GameController down to orchestration, AI scheduling, audio effects and persistence.
Moved board, shell, scoreboard, actions, options and history rendering into their Web Components.
Shared repeated Shadow DOM button styles through the component render utility.
Removed expensive global CSS containment and will-change rules from the reset.
Kept the initial start screen lighter by lazy-registering game-only components with the runtime.
Preloaded the game runtime during idle time to reduce perceived start delay.
Prevented intro audio from overlapping gameplay sounds.
Preserved the original version 4 marker animations while avoiding unnecessary tile attribute resets.

releases.summary: Componentize ripple buttons and Material Symbols icons while keeping the runtime lighter with lazy AI loading and targeted rendering hints.
releases.commit_message: fix: componentize ripple icons and lazy AI loading (v4.1.1 Key Lime Pie)
migration_notes: No localStorage schema changes were introduced.
Existing saved player names, colors, mode, difficulty, starter, match mode and mute settings remain compatible.
notes: Added a button-ripple Web Component with a default slot so button attributes, classes, data attributes and click handlers stay on the custom element host.
Added a material-icon Web Component with slotted icon names and component-owned Material Symbols font registration.
Updated game action, start menu, history and options templates to use shared button-ripple and material-icon components.
Lazy-load AI player code when the controller needs an AI move instead of including it in the initial game runtime.
Restored targeted contain and will-change hints on animated component surfaces without reintroducing broad global rendering hints.
Tightened release governance so every shipped version in versions.json carries an authoritative commit_message.
